BOUTIQUE WEALTH MANAGEMENT

Award winning, internationally qualified financial advisors in Dubai specialising in expat finance. 

Finsbury Associates is a highly regulated financial services group based in Dubai, UAE, which specialises in providing consultation, advice and bespoke solutions in all areas of financial planning.

+971 4 567 4500
info@finsbury-associates.com

Follow
Follow
Follow
Follow



Protection

Life and Critical Illness cover is probably the most essential yet overlooked aspect of financial planning.

Are your family provided for in the case of an emergency?



Investment

Invest in a smart and diversified portfolio designed specifically to meet your needs.

  You have worked hard for your money, let’s make it work for you.



Estate Planning

Passing on your wealth as an expat can be complicated due to wills, trusts, gifts, or tax.

Ensure your assets are protected through proper planning.



Property

We’re passionate about clients having a diversified portfolio and so we have partnered with leading providers who can offer a variety of property investment opportunities.



Pensions

Pensions can be confusing, with so many different types, options and language.

The first step in dealing with pensions is to understand them.

Holistic Award Winning Financial Advisors

Finsbury Associates is an award winning boutique wealth management and financial consulting firm. Based in Dubai, and part of Blue Sky Thinking Group and Finsbury Wealth, our team of CISI qualified financial advisors are passionate about delivering a holistic, turn key service to help client’s achieve their financial goals. With over 40 years of experience in the industry, our goal is simple: to ensure highly qualified advisors in Dubai are on hand to safeguard all aspects of your financial situation and to help you achieve your financial goals. All of our financial advisors in Dubai are a minimum of level 3 qualified in Financial Services and are provided with regular training and clear career progression goals and paths. Contact us today for more information.

Investment Options To Suit The Client

Our global partnerships help ensure a diversified and independent investment strategy.

Internationally Qualified Advisors

We only employ
internationally qualified
advisors who range from level 4 to level 7
CISI qualified.

Licensed & Regulated Advice

Finsbury Associates
(FAEU) is licensed by the UAE Insurance Authority License 92. 

Award Winning Client Service

In the last 4 years we have received multiple industry accolades from independent bodies for our client service.

No Cold Calling

Put simply, we don’t
cold call. We never have
and never will.

From all financial advisors in my 15 years in Dubai, I have found James to be more structured, on top of his game, advises as per client’s needs, and transparent.

Hence I chose to invest with Finsbury … A strong relationship has been built and that aids towards feeling secure that my investments are in the right hands.

Peter Meroi, Area Manager, ThermoKing

Toni is one of the best qualified financial advisors in Dubai I have come across. He is always on top of his game and has his hands on the pulse of the market .
This has proven instrumental in making timely decisions. He has also brought great improvement in terms of portfolio management transparency. This has made it easier to have a good view of where funds are allocated and how they are performing.”

Emad Shafik, Executive Partner, Gartner

Neil has been our financial advisor for over six years now. He has been incredibly diligent and proactive in managing our portfolio, and is the complete opposite of your typical adviser who takes your money and runs. He’s the consummate professional … and is constantly advising with regular meetings and follow ups. We’ve always felt our investments are in safe hands. The best financial advisor in Dubai!

Adrian Parkes, Chief Financial Officer, Cracknell

We Are Waiting
Let’s Get Started Now!

Our goal is simple: to ensure highly qualified professionals are on hand to safeguard all aspects of your financial situation and to help you achieve your financial goals.

Let's speak

FAEU Insurance Broker LLC  Data Security And Client Confidentiality Policy

 

FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy during the course of providing insurance brokering and administration services (“the Service”).

We are responsible for the processing of any personal information you provide to the Service. We protect your personal information and use it only in connection with your use of the Service as described in this Privacy Policy. We have implemented industry standard administrative, technical and physical security safeguards designed to protect you and your employees’ information.

 

We take our responsibilities regarding the protection of personal information very seriously. This policy explains how we use personal information that we may obtain about you. By using the Service, you consent to this use.

This Policy sets out the basis on which any personal data we collect from you, or that you provide to us, will be processed by us.  Please read the following carefully to understand our views and practices regarding your personal data and how we will treat it.

We may, in our sole discretion, modify or update this Privacy Policy from time to time and if we make material changes to it we will notify you through the Service or by other means so that you may review the changes before you continue to use the Service. Your continued use of the Service after we publish or communicate a notice about any changes to this Privacy Policy means that you consent to the changes.

The contact information you provide us with may also be shared across BSTG (FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC, Safe Hands First Aid Training LLC, Beneple DMCC) and our partners.

You may unsubscribe from these communications at any time by clicking the unsubscribe button in the email, or alternatively contacting us at info@finsbury-associates.com

Information we may collect from you

FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC needs personal information about you, your employees and their dependents as applicable to provide the Service and your providing the information to us constitutes your consent to our processing of this information. We may collect information about you from your employer rather than directly from you. We may collect and process the following data about you:

Registration information necessary to facilitate insurance brokering operations.

Identity information used to identify you and your dependents 

Filling in forms. Information that you provide by filling in forms through the Service.

Interaction with our  administration support team. We may also ask you for information, when you report a problem with the Service or when you provide us with feedback. When you contact our administration support team we may review your FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC profile and we will collect information to categorise your questions, investigate, resolve and respond to any queries. We may use this information to track possible problems and trends, improve the Service, and customise our support responses. If you contact us, we may keep a record of that correspondence.

Information from Surveys. We may also ask you to complete surveys that we use for research purposes, although you do not have to respond to them.

Details of transactions you carry out through the Service and for the fulfilment of your orders. 

Use and Disclosure of Your Information

We may use your information as follows:

To provide the Service to you. FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC uses the information it collects to provide the Service to our clients. 

To communicate with you. FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC may send you messages relating to your use of the Service and service related matters. We may send promotional materials via email so that you are able to take advantage of them.

To comply with legal process and other disclosures. Where we have a good faith belief that access, use, preservation or disclosure of such information is reasonably necessary to (a) satisfy any applicable law, regulation, legal process or enforceable governmental request, (b) detect, prevent or otherwise address fraud, security or technical issues or (c) protect against imminent harm to the rights, property or safety of FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC, its employees or the public as required or permitted by law.

To disclose to a third party as the result of a sale or change in control of FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC. If FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC or its subsidiaries or holding company become involved in a merger, acquisition or any form of sale of some or all of their assets.

To work with our vendors and service providers. FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC uses third party vendors and service providers who e.g. provide technical infrastructure services. For the purpose of processing personal information on your behalf we may transfer your data to third parties situated within or outside of the United Arab Emirates. We require that any parties who agree to process such information based on our instructions are in compliance with this Policy and any other appropriate confidentiality and security measures. Unfortunately, the transmission of information via the internet is not completely secure. Although we will do our best to protect your personal data, we cannot guarantee the security of your data transmitted to our Website; any transmission is at your own risk. Once we have received your information, we will use strict procedures and security features to try to prevent unauthorised access.

General

Storage and Processing. Your information collected through the Service may be stored and processed in the United Arab Emirates or in any other country in which FAEU Insurance Brokers LLC has subsidiaries, affiliates or service providers.

Information we may obtain from third parties. In order to protect you from fraud or other misconduct, we may obtain information about you from third parties to verify the information you provide.
